title: Adapted Origins Legacy
description: A modern update to IHasName's "Adapted/Evolving Origins" datapack. Designed for Origins Legacy.
body:
## Overview
Adapted Origins Legacy is a modern port of IHasName's "Adapted/Evolved Origins" Datapack. It adds evolutions to origins once they defeat the ender dragon. It also adds 3 New origins as well. This is meant for use with Origins Legacy. 

## 3 New Origins
- Nevian - Lizard based origin with an afinity for deserts and potions.
- Undying - A ghost with a second chance at life.
- Ashen Skelleton - A wither skelleton based origin that feeds on others to live.

## Origins and their evolutions
Please refer to the wiki [here](https://github.com/DuckieOverload/Adapted-Origins-Legacy/wiki).

## Credits
I did not make the original datapack. I was inspired and enjoyed the original, but it was broken on modern versions. Please see his original video [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8QVJLXMobu8).
